name: Body Weight
description: No equipment required. Exercises can be performed using bodyweight only.

name: Battle Ropes
description: Heavy ropes used for high-intensity interval training, improving overall strength and endurance.

name: Punching Bag
description: A heavy bag used for boxing and kickboxing training, enhancing upper body strength and endurance.

name: Dumbbells
description: A pair of small hand-held weights used for resistance training.

name: Barbell
description: A long bar with weights attached at each end, used in weightlifting.

name: Kettlebell
description: A round weight with a handle, used for swinging and lifting exercises.

name: Resistance Bands
description: Elastic bands used for strength training, stretching, and rehabilitation exercises.

name: Yoga Mat
description: A padded mat used for yoga, stretching, and floor exercises.

name: Medicine Ball
description: A weighted ball used for strength training and conditioning exercises.

name: Exercise Ball
description: A large, inflatable ball used for balance, core strength, and stability exercises.

name: Cable Crossover Machine
description: A machine with adjustable cables for performing a wide range of exercises targeting the chest, back, and arms.

name: Smith Machine
description: A weightlifting machine with a barbell that moves along a fixed vertical path for safety.

name: Treadmill
description: A machine used for walking or running in place.

name: Recumbent Stepper
description: A seated stepping machine that combines the benefits of a stepper and a recumbent bike, providing a low-impact cardio workout.

name: Vertical Climber
description: A machine that simulates vertical climbing, offering a full-body workout that targets the legs, arms, and core.

name: Jacobs Ladder
description: A cardio machine featuring moving rungs that simulate climbing a ladder, providing a high-intensity, low-impact workout.

name: Stair Climber
description: A machine that simulates climbing stairs, targeting the leg and glute muscles for an effective cardio workout.

name: Fan Bike
description: A type of stationary bike with large, fan-like blades that provide resistance. The harder you pedal, the more resistance is created by the fan, offering a full-body workout.

name: Upright Bike
description: A type of stationary bike where the rider sits upright, similar to a traditional bicycle. It mimics the experience of outdoor cycling.

name: Recumbent Bike
description: A type of stationary bike with a reclining seat and backrest, allowing the rider to sit in a more relaxed, laid-back position. Provides more comfort and reduces stress on the back and knees.

name: Air Rowing Machine
description: A type of rowing machine that uses air resistance to simulate the feeling of rowing on water. The machine has a flywheel with air resistance, which adjusts the level of resistance based on the intensity of the rowing stroke, providing a smooth and effective full-body workout.

name: Ski Ergometer
description: A machine designed to simulate cross-country skiing movements. It provides a full-body workout by using handles or poles to mimic the action of skiing, focusing on both upper and lower body strength and cardio fitness. Often used for endurance training and improving skiing technique.
